case_title: MASSINGALE DANIELLE VS MCGRAW INSURANCE SERVICES NORTHERN CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MASSINGALE DANIELLE AS TO DEFENDANT MCGRAW INSURANCE SERVICES NORTHERN CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MASSINGALE DANIELLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCGRAW INSURANCE SERVICES NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COURT FINDS POLICY LAPSED. NO COVERAGE ON 6/5/91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
